notes: People-search / background check site. Correct result: MEDIUM (38). Score breakdown: people_search_site(+20) + privacy_registrar(+8) + dv_cert_only(+5) + cloudflare_proxy(+5) = 38. Title explicitly says 'background check' and 'people search'. WHOIS privacy via WhoisGuard, Inc. Domain is 3,552 days old — no age signal. Unlike lookups.io and beenverified/peoplelooker, technology stack does NOT show Magento — so platform_mismatch does not fire, keeping score lower at 38 vs 53. Two trust signals present (privacy policy, terms of service) so missing_all_trust_signals does not fire.

metadata.title: TruthFinder | Background Check & People Search
metadata.description: Run a background check or people search with TruthFinder. Find public records, contact information, and more.
